description: Back at your hotel by noon — rest of the day free for other Dubai attractions

description: Gather around a crackling campfire for stories and warmth under the desert sky

description: Fresh linen, pillows, and warm blankets provided in your Bedouin tent

description: Guided walk to discover desert flora, fauna, and animal tracks at dawn

description: Professional briefing on quad bike controls, safety rules, and track navigation

description: Easy-to-ride automatic quad bike — no gear changes, no prior experience needed

title: GoPro or Action Camera Rental
description: Available for hire at the desert — pre-booking recommended

title: Phone Charging at Camp
description: Limited or no power outlets at desert camps — bring a portable power bank

title: Travel or Medical Insurance
description: Not included — guests are advised to carry their own coverage

title: Horse Riding
description: Available at the desert as an optional paid activity

title: Extended Quad Bike Time
description: Additional 30-minute quad sessions available at extra charge at the site

title: Spectacular Sunset Point
description: Dedicated stop at the highest dune for an unforgettable golden-hour experience

title: Lavish BBQ Feast
description: Generous buffet with live grilling, multiple cuisines, and unlimited beverages

title: Zero Light Pollution
description: The desert night sky reveals thousands of stars invisible from the city

title: Desert Sunrise Experience
description: Wake to a breathtaking display of colour as the sun crests the dunes

title: Dual Adrenaline Rush
description: Quad biking AND dune bashing in a single action-packed outing

title: Couples & Family Friendly
description: Activities tailored for all ages and interests — from relaxed to extreme

title: Government Licensed Operation
description: All drivers government-certified, all vehicles maintained to top safety standards

title: Expert English-Speaking Guide
description: Knowledgeable, friendly guide throughout your entire journey

title: Vertigo or Dizziness
description: Quad biking not recommended for guests prone to vertigo or severe dizziness

title: Recent Hand or Arm Injury
description: Quad biking requires full hand and arm control — avoid if recently injured

title: Children Under 16 Self-Driving
description: Quad bike self-driving restricted to ages 16+. Younger riders ride with an instructor.
